package.name: evk4_sdk_advanced
package.description: Opt-in advanced layer: runs Metavision SDK (Pro) computer-vision algorithms on the EVK4 event stream. First pipeline: sparse optical flow rendered to a ROS image. Consumes the driver's EventPacket stream (decoded with event_camera_codecs) and feeds it to the SDK via the camera-independent process_events API, so the driver's params (ERC, biases) govern the camera. The Metavision SDK is found by CMake against a separately built/installed SDK Pro (see docs/sdk/access.md); it is NOT a ROS/rosdep package, so this component is skipped at build time when the SDK is absent.
